_meta.purpose: Multi-intent validation targeting bench_scale125 (125 intents across 5 domains). Tests MicroResolve's token-consumption multi-intent decomposition at realistic enterprise scale.

categories_explanation.three_intent: 3 or more intents in single query
categories_explanation.realistic_workflow: real enterprise workflows spanning multiple systems
